name: Docs QA
description: Docs-only fallback QA pass for aligning downstream documentation without a full verification pass.
content:
Review the work completed in the current context and update affected downstream documentation only.

Use this as a focused fallback when I specifically want documentation alignment without a full verification and repair pass. For normal end-of-work verification, use :verify instead.

Check relevant downstream materials only when they are affected by the change, including README files, specs, workflow docs, feature docs, decision docs, implementation notes, project cards or equivalent state files, quick-help text, prompt-chain hints, and similar project documentation.

Requirements:
- Identify what changed.
- Identify which documents are outdated because of that change.
- Update those documents so they accurately reflect the current state.
- Flag anything ambiguous, conflicting, or missing.
- Prioritize correctness, consistency, and downstream coverage.
